description: Style NoteFall head over heels in love with this chic and stylish tote from baggit. Its timeless design is set to see you through many seasons to come. A sophisticated addition to your accessory collection, you can pair this bag with western as well as ethnic ensembles.Product DetailsBrown bag with all over dark brown print with bronze shimmer detail on the frontTwo main zippered compartmentsZippered pocket at backSynthetic lining with zippered pocketTwo short handles for carrying easeMaterial and CareFabric, syntheticWipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirtSizeHeight: 39 cmWidth: 58 cm
